review_comments_addressed.topic: Use append+reverse (or reversed iteration) instead of repeated insert(0) while preserving newest-first semantics.

changes.summary: Optimise _load_jobs_from_disk job ordering rebuild to avoid O(n^2) insert(0) loop; preserve newest-first external ordering.

notes: No functional behaviour change intended: /jobs.json ordering remains newest-first.
Change is startup-only (disk job index rebuild) and reduces list operations for large job directories.
